markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Discuss potential collaboration between Fabius and GrowthX for customer qualification and analysis tools.](https://fathom.video/share/8vwxUWVPxW3g_d_cjz3tRtXwyRW8okt1?tab=summary&timestamp=109.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [GrowthX seeks to improve customer qualification, ICP understanding, and scalable service offerings](https://fathom.video/share/8vwxUWVPxW3g_d_cjz3tRtXwyRW8okt1?tab=summary&timestamp=787.0)
  - [Fabius offers AI-powered analysis of customer interactions for deep insights and qualification](https://fathom.video/share/8vwxUWVPxW3g_d_cjz3tRtXwyRW8okt1?tab=summary&timestamp=319.0)
  - [Both parties aligned on value proposition; demo scheduled for Tuesday at 3:30 PM](https://fathom.video/share/8vwxUWVPxW3g_d_cjz3tRtXwyRW8okt1?tab=summary&timestamp=1091.0)
  - [GrowthX has developed detailed ICP criteria that could integrate well with Fabius platform](https://fathom.video/share/8vwxUWVPxW3g_d_cjz3tRtXwyRW8okt1?tab=summary&timestamp=1414.0)

## Topics

### GrowthX's Current Challenges and Goals

  - [Seeking to define Ideal Customer Profile (ICP) and scalable service offerings](https://fathom.video/share/8vwxUWVPxW3g_d_cjz3tRtXwyRW8okt1?tab=summary&timestamp=787.0)
  - [Need for data-driven customer qualification across sales and delivery processes](https://fathom.video/share/8vwxUWVPxW3g_d_cjz3tRtXwyRW8okt1?tab=summary&timestamp=188.0)
  - [Aim to standardize sales process and enable team with consistent language/approach](https://fathom.video/share/8vwxUWVPxW3g_d_cjz3tRtXwyRW8okt1?tab=summary&timestamp=1000.0)
  - [Current manual process of analyzing transcripts and creating enablement documents](https://fathom.video/share/8vwxUWVPxW3g_d_cjz3tRtXwyRW8okt1?tab=summary&timestamp=1253.0)

### Fabius Platform Overview

  - [Analyzes calls, emails, and documents for comprehensive customer insights](https://fathom.video/share/8vwxUWVPxW3g_d_cjz3tRtXwyRW8okt1?tab=summary&timestamp=319.0)
  - [Offers customizable prompts for specific business questions and ICP criteria](https://fathom.video/share/8vwxUWVPxW3g_d_cjz3tRtXwyRW8okt1?tab=summary&timestamp=332.0)
  - [Three analysis types: ongoing (per interaction), ad-hoc, and scheduled (e.g., weekly/monthly)](https://fathom.video/share/8vwxUWVPxW3g_d_cjz3tRtXwyRW8okt1?tab=summary&timestamp=1091.0)
  - [Can replace some functionality of tools like Fathom, integrating with Zoom recordings](https://fathom.video/share/8vwxUWVPxW3g_d_cjz3tRtXwyRW8okt1?tab=summary&timestamp=650.0)

### Potential Implementation for GrowthX

  - [Would analyze customer interactions against GrowthX's detailed ICP criteria](https://fathom.video/share/8vwxUWVPxW3g_d_cjz3tRtXwyRW8okt1?tab=summary&timestamp=1414.0)
  - [Could provide 1-10 scoring on ICP fit, with pros/cons and qualitative insights](https://fathom.video/share/8vwxUWVPxW3g_d_cjz3tRtXwyRW8okt1?tab=summary&timestamp=1481.0)
  - [Flexibility to adjust scoring weights and iterate on ICP definition over time](https://fathom.video/share/8vwxUWVPxW3g_d_cjz3tRtXwyRW8okt1?tab=summary&timestamp=1604.0)
  - [Integration with HubSpot (sales CRM) and Notion (client management) possible](https://fathom.video/share/8vwxUWVPxW3g_d_cjz3tRtXwyRW8okt1?tab=summary&timestamp=1658.0)

### Pricing and Next Steps

  - [Fabius pricing: $300/month platform fee + $100/month per seat](https://fathom.video/share/8vwxUWVPxW3g_d_cjz3tRtXwyRW8okt1?tab=summary&timestamp=1386.0)
  - [Demo scheduled for Tuesday at 3:30 PM](https://fathom.video/share/8vwxUWVPxW3g_d_cjz3tRtXwyRW8okt1?tab=summary&timestamp=1268.0)
  - [Post-demo: Potential analysis of sample GrowthX data to demonstrate value](https://fathom.video/share/8vwxUWVPxW3g_d_cjz3tRtXwyRW8okt1?tab=summary&timestamp=1326.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Fabius to prepare demo tailored to GrowthX's use case for Tuesday meeting](https://fathom.video/share/8vwxUWVPxW3g_d_cjz3tRtXwyRW8okt1?tab=summary&timestamp=1091.0)
  - [GrowthX to consider providing sample data for post-demo analysis](https://fathom.video/share/8vwxUWVPxW3g_d_cjz3tRtXwyRW8okt1?tab=summary&timestamp=1326.0)
  - [Explore potential integration with GrowthX's existing tools (HubSpot, Notion, Fathom)](https://fathom.video/share/8vwxUWVPxW3g_d_cjz3tRtXwyRW8okt1?tab=summary&timestamp=1658.0)
  - [Discuss internal decision-making process for tool adoption at GrowthX](https://fathom.video/share/8vwxUWVPxW3g_d_cjz3tRtXwyRW8okt1?tab=summary&timestamp=1374.0)
